question: What model name is embossed on the silver band of the red mixer during the attachment installation? A. FRESH PREP SLICER/SHREDDER B. ARTISAN C. Get Started D. WARNING
How many shredder blades are arranged on the counter in the opening scenes?
What is the primary color of the stand mixer's main body shown throughout the video? A. White B. Black C. Red D. Green
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A red KitchenAid stand mixer sits on a white countertop surrounded by fresh vegetables like cabbage and cheese. A person attaches a white food grinder accessory to the front hub of the mixer. They insert black cylindrical shredding blades into the attachment and secure it by turning a black tightening knob. Three metal grater drums stand nearby on the surface.

question: Which of the previously seen kitchen items is visible on the counter in this segment? A. <silver kitchen knife with a metallic blade> B. <red KitchenAid stand mixer with a white food grinder attachment> C. <black cylindrical shredding blade> D. <wooden cutting board with vegetables>

Did the video show BOTH red apples AND three metal grater attachments? A. Only red apples were shown B. Only three metal grater attachments were shown C. Both red apples and three metal grater attachments were shown D. Neither red apples nor three metal grater attachments were shown
Where is the red stand mixer positioned on the countertop? A. in the background B. on the left side C. in the bottom left corner D. in the foreground
Where is the orange and white warning label located on the screen? A. on the right side B. in the background C. on the left side D. in the bottom left corner
Describe each step of the attachment assembly process as it happens in the video.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a person inserts a metal grater attachment into the front hub of the red mixer; at 12s, the white food grinder accessory is aligned with the hub; at 14s, a hand turns a black knob to secure the attachment in place; at 16s, a black shredding blade is inserted into the white food grinder attachment.
